name: Homemade Chocolates (Laura Secord Type)
recipeIngredient: 1 can Eagle Brand sweetened condensed milk
recipeInstructions:
The above ingredients are approximate quantities only!!!
For every cup of icing sugar, mix in approximately 1 teaspoon of softened butter or margarine. Then slowly mix in enough evaporated milk to make the mixture of a consistency such that you can form a ball with it (mixing with hands is easiest).
Next, separate the mixture into as many parts (3 or 4) as desired for different flavored chocolates. Slowly knead in the desired flavoring and food coloring for each part. Now mold the resultant mixture into the desired shapes and sizes.
Melt two parts semi-sweet chocolate to one part paraffin wax in a double boiler or microwave. Remove from heat. Immediately dip each shape into the melted chocolate mixture, coating them completely. Place on wax paper until the chocolate coating is set. If necessary, reheat and continue dipping if the chocolate mixture thickens.
Suggested flavors and colors:
- Maple flavor with no coloring
- Mint flavor with green coloring
- Lemon flavor with yellow coloring
- Orange flavor with orange coloring
- Almond flavoring with red coloring (small amount for pink)
Variations:
- With maple flavoring, bury a piece of pecan or walnut inside the candy before dipping.
- With almond flavoring, bury a maraschino cherry inside the candy and add a drop of cherry juice to prevent it from being too dry.
- Use the same recipe to make Easter eggs, bunnies, etc. For example, for Easter eggs, create a center part in one color and flavor, then wrap it in another color and flavor before dipping.
